items.title: NASA Announces Public-Private Partnership to Advance Mars Science - NASA
items.content_text: NASA Wednesday announced a new public‑private partnership to advance Mars science by combining the agency’s scientific leadership with commercial innovation.

items.title: 2026 News Releases - NASA

items.title: Advanced Health Research on Station Using Augmented, Virtual Reality Tools - NASA
items.content_text: Biomedical tests using augmented and virtual reality tools to advance space health dominated the research schedule aboard the International Space Station on Wednesday. The Expedition 74 crew is also turning its attention to a spacewalk at the end of the month following the departure of a U.S. cargo spacecraft.

items.title: Advanced Tech on Station Informing Space-Designed Health Treatments - NASA
items.content_text: The Expedition 74 crew explored how weightlessness affects cartilage growth and the digestive system on Thursday to protect crew health and improve patient care on Earth. The orbital residents are also gearing up for a robotics maintenance spacewalk at the end of the month on the International Space Station.

items.title: News | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Keep up with the latest from Rocket Lab.

items.title: Rocket Lab Awarded $90M Contract to Build GEO Satellites Hosting Space Domain Awareness Payload for U.S. Space Force  | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Award marks Rocket Lab's first satellite production program for geostationary orbit and continues a Space Systems Command program for development and delivery on orbit of two Heimdall prototype payloads by Rocket Lab Optical Systems.

items.title: Rocket Lab Adds Mars-Proven Robotics Capabilities with Completion of Motiv Space Systems Acquisition | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Acquisition brings Mars heritage for complex planetary missions, as well as precision mechanisms essential for next-generation space infrastructure including orbital data centers and constellations

items.title: Mission Success: Rocket Lab Completes 9th Electron Launch for Synspective | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Mahia, New Zealand – Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB), a global leader in launch services and space systems, today announced the successful deployment of the latest satellite for Synspective, marking the ninth dedicated mission Rocket Lab has completed for the Japan-based Earth observation…

items.title: Rocket Lab Awarded $30 Million Contract for HASTE Hypersonic Rocket Launches for Anduril | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: Long Beach, California. May 7, 2026 – Rocket Lab Corporation (Nasdaq: RKLB), a global leader in launch services and space systems, today announced it has been selected by defense technology company Anduril Industries for multiple hypersonic test flights with its HASTE launch vehicle. The…

items.title: Rocket Lab’s Biggest Launch Deal Yet:  Confidential Customer Books Multiple Neutron and Electron Launches | Rocket Lab
items.content_text: The multi-launch contract includes dedicated missions on five Neutron and three Electron rockets for a confidential customer with the launches baselined for 2026-2029

items.title: May 2026 Company Update
